label: The Sixfold Cask
description: The Sixfold Cask occupies a prismatic alcove off Vesper Filament Port’s ribbed concourse, its walls segmented into six facets aligned to the filament-cage geometry of Vesper Node. Dark composite ribs frame panes of calibrated glass that admit the port’s disciplined bands of radiance as angular, slow-moving light across the interior. A low bar of polished voidstone follows a strict polyhedral line, while recessed seating niches are cut deep into the structure to dampen vibration from the mooring spines. Luminous linework inlaid in the floor renders a constant geometric script underfoot, marking regulated paths through the room without breaking its hush.
